activities_projects.title: Local Consumer Awareness Survey
activities_projects.objective: To assess the level of consumer awareness in the local community.
steps: Design a questionnaire covering consumer rights awareness and complaint procedures.
Survey at least 20 people from different age groups.
Analyze responses using tables and prepare a detailed report with suggestions.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students evaluate real-world awareness levels and identify gaps in knowledge.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess survey design, data analysis accuracy, and quality of recommendations.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Court Case Study Research
activities_projects.objective: To analyze a real consumer court case and understand legal procedures.
steps: Research a real consumer court case in India.
Identify the issue, rights violated, and final judgment.
Prepare a structured case analysis report.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand legal redressal mechanisms and practical application of rights.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate research depth, clarity of explanation, and legal understanding.

activities_projects.title: Misleading Advertisement Investigation
activities_projects.objective: To critically examine misleading advertisements and their impact.
steps: Select an advertisement suspected of exaggeration.
Analyze claims with supporting facts.
Prepare a report explaining how it may violate consumer rights.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical evaluation skills regarding advertising ethics.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess logical reasoning, evidence used, and clarity of analysis.

activities_projects.title: Digital Consumer Fraud Awareness Campaign
activities_projects.objective: To create awareness about online consumer fraud.
steps: Research common online fraud cases.
Design posters or pamphlets suggesting preventive measures.
Present the campaign plan to classmates.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand risks in digital transactions and preventive steps.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate creativity, accuracy of information, and effectiveness of message.

activities_projects.title: Quality Certification Marks Study
activities_projects.objective: To research certification standards and their enforcement.
steps: Collect examples of products with ISI, AGMARK, Hallmark, FSSAI marks.
Research the authority behind each certification.
Prepare a report on their importance in consumer protection.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand regulatory mechanisms ensuring product quality.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess research accuracy and depth of explanation.

activities_projects.title: Complaint Filing Procedure Project
activities_projects.objective: To study the process of filing a complaint in consumer courts.
steps: Research steps required to file a consumer complaint online or offline.
Prepare a step-by-step flowchart.
Explain the required documents and fees.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students gain practical knowledge of legal complaint procedures.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check accuracy of steps and clarity of flowchart.

activities_projects.title: Comparative Study of Consumer Protection Laws
activities_projects.objective: To compare Consumer Protection Act 1986 and 2019.
steps: List major provisions of both Acts.
Identify new features introduced in 2019.
Analyze how changes improved consumer protection.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand evolution of consumer protection laws.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate comparison clarity and analytical reasoning.

activities_projects.title: Product Safety Audit Project
activities_projects.objective: To examine product safety standards in local shops.
steps: Visit at least five shops to check expiry dates and certification marks.
Record unsafe or non-certified products.
Prepare a safety audit report with suggestions.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect theoretical rights with real-world monitoring.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess thoroughness of audit and practicality of recommendations.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Rights Documentary
activities_projects.objective: To creatively present consumer rights awareness.
activities_projects.materials: Mobile phone camera, notebook, editing app (optional)
steps: Research common consumer problems in the locality.
Record interviews or dramatize a consumer complaint scenario.
Create a 5–7 minute documentary explaining rights and solutions.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop communication skills and awareness of rights.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess creativity, factual correctness, and clarity of message.

activities_projects.title: Policy Recommendation Report for Consumer Safety
activities_projects.objective: To suggest improvements in consumer protection mechanisms.
steps: Identify common consumer issues in India.
Research current government measures.
Prepare a policy recommendation report suggesting improvements.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop policy analysis and critical thinking skills.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate depth of research, feasibility of suggestions, and structured presentation.
